name: Open Flip Square
searchText: open-flip-square open flip square minimal open-source open-pack-2026 flip square minimal html css react cssonly customizable singleelement
previewCss: .darma-loader-open-flip-square{display:inline-block;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--loader-color,#111827),var(--loader-secondary-color,#6b7280));animation:darma-loader-open-flip-square-flip var(--loader-speed,1.25s) cubic-bezier(.65,0,.35,1) infinite}@keyframes darma-loader-open-flip-square-flip{0%{transform:perspective(140px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0)}50%{transform:perspective(140px) rotateX(-180deg) rotateY(0)}100%{transform:perspective(140px) rotateX(-180deg) rotateY(-180deg)}}

code.css: .darma-loader-open-flip-square{display:inline-block;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--loader-color,#111827),var(--loader-secondary-color,#6b7280));animation:darma-loader-open-flip-square-flip var(--loader-speed,1.25s) cubic-bezier(.65,0,.35,1) infinite}@keyframes darma-loader-open-flip-square-flip{0%{transform:perspective(140px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0)}50%{transform:perspective(140px) rotateX(-180deg) rotateY(0)}100%{transform:perspective(140px) rotateX(-180deg) rotateY(-180deg)}}
